meta.title: Child Growth Percentile Calculator — WHO Standards | Health Calculators
meta.description: Calculate growth percentiles for children (0–18 years) using WHO standards: weight, height, BMI and head circumference with interpretation.

childGrowth.title: Child Growth Percentile Calculator
childGrowth.description: Weight, height and BMI percentiles for children aged 0–18 years based on WHO growth standards.
childGrowth.disclaimer: This tool uses WHO Child Growth Standards (2006) and WHO Reference 2007. Results are for informational purposes only and do not replace professional medical evaluation. Always consult a paediatrician if you have concerns.
